授業目的: This is a continuation of the Speaking 1 and Speaking II classes. The goal for this class is to develop your reading and speaking skills.  Almost all of the activities in the class will be either reading or speaking activities. The topics in this class will be discussed more in depth to give the students a chance to develop their own ideas and opinions and to be able to express their ideas and opinions using an audio MP3 recording.
到達目標: Course GoalsThis course is designed to…	build your confidence to use English	increase your vocabulary and knowledge about various topics	improve your reading and listening comprehension

トピック.授業計画1: The topics for this class will be: Culture & Travel, Media, & Technology.
トピック.授業外学習2: Most homework and speaking preparation will be done outside of class

教科書/Required texts0: No Text - The teacher will provide all study materials.
学生による授業評価の方法Course Evaluation by Student: 各授業科目は、各学部・研究科の定めるディプロマ・ポリシー（DP）・カリキュラム・ポリシー（CP）に基づき、カリキュラム上に配置されています。DP・CPを意識して本授業科目の学修を進めることで、各学部・研究科の期待する能力が養成されます。各学部・研究科のDP、CPや教育課程表（授業科目一覧等）は、下記リンクこちらに掲載していますので学修計画の参考にしてください。https://kwic.kwansei.ac.jp/cabinet/reference?typeCd=0&cabinetId=557&directLink=1※kwicへのリンクとなります（在学生のみ閲覧可）
